ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2019 Continued To Oct-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Oct-29-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610) ** Review after hearing: Address for Plaintiff's counsel was entered incorrectly. No sanctions issued. **
